cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste Gopal ji, kaise ho aap? Welcome to Bank of Maharashtra. My name is Rohan, and I'll be assisting you today.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste Rohan ji, main thik hoon. Mera debit card guma gaya hai, toh usko block karne ki process bataiye.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 15s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: Reporting a Lost Card: A legitimate agent guides the user through the process of blocking their lost debit card and issuing a new one, following all correct verification steps.
